title: User Story Schema
description: Comprehensive user story format capturing As-a/I-want/So-that with full detail

asA.description: The user role or persona - the complete 'As a...' clause
examples: a user with a screen reader

iWant.description: The desired capability or action - the complete 'I want...' clause
examples: to set up a Vite + React + TypeScript project with proper configuration and folder structure
to see a multi-column Kanban board organized by story status

soThat.description: The value or benefit gained - the complete 'So that...' clause
examples: I have a solid foundation for building the BMAD UI application
I can quickly understand the distribution of work across workflow stages
I can work efficiently without using the mouse

role.description: Alternative field name for asA (for backward compatibility)

action.description: Alternative field name for iWant (for backward compatibility)
examples: to be able to log in with my email

benefit.description: Alternative field name for soThat (for backward compatibility)
examples: I can access my personalized content

formatted.description: Pre-formatted complete user story as a single string
examples: As a developer, I want to set up a Vite + React + TypeScript project with proper configuration and folder structure, So that I have a solid foundation for building the BMAD UI application.

context.description: Additional context or background for the user story

notes.description: Additional notes about this user story
